case_title: DAVIS, STEVE VS STEELE, VALANCE MS.

docket_entries.description: DEFT.FILING MOTION CONTINUANCE(ORDERED)FOR 6/7 330 PM(CAL:20-3);PAID $10 CHECK;FOLDER FOR COMM'S SIG.

THE COURT HAS ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF DAVIS, STEVE RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT STEELE, VALANCE MS. $3,000.00 PRINCIPAL, TOTAL JUDGMENT $3,000.00 STAY OF EXECUTION 30 DAYS
PLAINTIFF REQUEST FOR A CONTINUANCE TO BE SIGNED BY JUDGE DATE REQUESTED IS 5/11/99 AT 10.00 AM. $10.00 PAID.
